context: Tests whether the response correctly refactors a callback-based function to async/await with proper error handling.

checklist.name: Function is async
checklist.description: The refactored function uses the async keyword

checklist.name: Uses await on db.query
checklist.description: Awaits the database query call instead of using a callback

checklist.name: Preserves not-found check
checklist.description: Still throws or rejects when no rows are returned (the empty result case)

checklist.name: Returns the user row
checklist.description: Returns rows[0] or equivalent single user result

checklist.name: Error propagation via throw or rejection
checklist.description: Database errors propagate naturally via async/await (thrown or uncaught) rather than being swallowed

checklist.name: No callback parameter in signature
checklist.description: The refactored function removes the callback parameter from the function signature
